name: Easton Coach Co
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER; Easton Coach 'About' page; Federal Register 2021-17133 (Van Pool Transportation LLC acquisition of control)
notes: Easton Coach Company LLC; founded 1984, incorporated as Easton Coach Company in 2002; Delaware LLC per Federal Register filing; acquired by Van Pool Transportation (Beacon Mobility family) in 2021. FMCSA legal address is Bethlehem PA, but company maintains a Flemington NJ facility (LINK bus contract) which matches the input HQ. Safety rating Satisfactory dated 08/29/2024. MCS-150 dated 01/21/2026, 1.62M miles in 2025. Inc date is approximate (year only).

name: Transportation Unlimited Inc
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 1464338 - TUI BUS SERVICES INC); BBB Dallas; tuibusservice.com About page
notes: Operating entity is TUI BUS SERVICES INC (legal name) d/b/a Transportation Unlimited Inc., 330 W Kiest Blvd, Dallas, TX 75224. The JSON's address (4301 Dawes Rd, Theodore, AL) does NOT match any FMCSA record; appears to be an upstream data error. State 'TX' matches the actual carrier. Two other USDOTs tied to this name (543269 and 3304037) are INACTIVE; another (2214451) is a Laredo TX broker (Rosa Crystal Cantu) unrelated. Charter/school/church bus operator since 1994. Safety rating Satisfactory dated 04/18/2024. MCS-150 dated 10/16/2025. Inc date is business-since year, not formal incorporation date.

name: Valley Medical Transport
registry_source: Company website (valleymedicaltransport.org); BBB Bakersfield profile; benefitscheckup.org; nextdoor
notes: Valley Medical Transport of Kern County, 601 Eureka St, Bakersfield, CA 93305. Non-emergency medical transport (wheelchair/ambulatory/gurney) serving Kern County since 2006. FMCSA SAFER returned no records for 'VALLEY MEDICAL' or 'VALLEY MEDICAL TRANSPORT' in CA (only a Winchester VA carrier with that name, USDOT 810590 - not a match). Likely intrastate-only NEMT under California PUC/local permit, not FMCSA-registered. CA Secretary of State entity number not retrievable via WebFetch (sos.ca.gov requires interactive search). Inc date (2006) is 'established since' year per company website.

name: Campbell Bus Lines
fmcsa_address: 258 Grove City Rd, Slippery Rock, PA 16057

PA Dept of State business search not directly fetchable (TLS cert issue on corporations.pa.gov endpoint). EIN 25-1264713 confirmed via eintaxid.com. Premier motorcoach operator with Prevost H3-45 luxury fleet.

name: Kids Door To Door
registry_source: Company website (kdtdtransport.com); Fun 4 Brandon Kids directory; Yellow Pages
notes: Kids Door To Door Inc, 601 N Valrico Rd, Valrico, FL 33594 (phone 813-655-8470). Specialized private school bus service operating Hillsborough County since 1984 (Brandon, Riverview, Valrico, Apollo Beach). Serves charter schools incl. Bridgeprep, Winthrop, Pepin, Southshore Charter, etc. FMCSA SAFER returned 'no records' for 'KIDS DOOR TO DOOR' - intrastate-only carrier, not FMCSA-registered. Sunbiz could not be directly queried via WebFetch (returned 403); a Sunbiz hit referenced 'Kids Door To Door Inc.' but full record not retrieved. Inc date 1984 is 'established since' year per company website; formal Sunbiz registration date not confirmed.
